## [Copy heading link](https://www.mamabaredoula.com/\#h.kb5k8ua8dzgd)    Tabitha - Mama Bare

My name is Tabitha; my husband and I and our two boys live in Whitehouse, TX. I became a doula because I am passionate about health and supporting women in all aspects of pregnancy, including labor & birth, nursing & newborn care, and postpartum support. Using natural and holistic practices, I provide support either in a hospital, birthing center or at-home birth. My training is through [Dona International](https://www.dona.org/), the leader in evidence-based doula training, certification and continuing education. If you are looking for a Doula or have questions about what a Doula can do for you during your birth process then you have come to the right place and I would love to support you. Serving the Tyler, TX and surrounding area.

## [Copy heading link](https://www.mamabaredoula.com/\#h.wnm2wi78wtmt)    What is a Doula?

The term doula comes from a Greek word meaning “a woman who serves.” A doula provides you information about your birth options and help you create a plan that’s right for you and your partner; she acts as a link between you and your medical care team during labor and birth. Studies show mothers who have a doula on site to give physical and emotional support may need less pain medication. A doula’s presence during labor and birth improves the outcome for both mom and baby.

## [Copy heading link](https://www.mamabaredoula.com/\#h.qzdszhi1wzj8)    How does it work? What does it cost?

We will do an initial meet to see if we are a good fit. As required by my certification organization, we will sign a confidentiality release form to get started. We will discuss the various options and your needs. When we sign a contract, there is a non-refundable deposit. In general, prices will range from $750-$1500, with the full fee dependent on the services you request. After a free first consult you'll receive package options.

We can also meet virtually! [Contact me](https://www.mamabaredoula.com/contact-me) for options!

![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/sitesv/AA5AbUD8HvG6XQuAWvnA7zVIsbCTY-d5v1o7Jd09zxLpJn8A0CFdQO9j1t3JxIiMk7ZELw4fqtKMyelZK9lWGgZFnAg5_bBZLyiU1zLDtI5F-JM0wKEnorR5b9TwJJd9w_bmb9PdfkaUYl7Zey4bKuFu0v4JT1Fmnl4Jaic-1qH4bP3Fvxv8yl985itGmg8Aik3zz8CfKS9Mp9rhVe-HjHpuUSxYop8iIcwU_SSkxQMjPf8=w1280)

"My husband and I are forever grateful for the support we were given during my labor and delivery. Tabitha guided my husband so that he was a support for me. She helped me through the hard contractions and reminded me of my grounding plan and breathing exercises. I could have my baby the way I wanted to - naturally. My husband and I agree that my labor would only have gone as smoothly with her guidance. We thought we were being clever when we scheduled classes as close to the due date as possible, and our child decided he would come early before our scheduled course. We had to go into this blind and depended heavily on Tabitha. I am also grateful for her continuing support after the birth and when we left the hospital. Overall, I had an incredible experience working with her."

##### About me

I created Mama Bare Doula LLC out of a passion for walking alongside mothers and families during one of the most meaningful times of their lives. My philosophy is simple: every mother deserves to feel supported, cared for, and confident from pregnancy through postpartum. I believe birth is not only about bringing a baby into the world but also about nurturing and strengthening the mother. My role is to provide comfort, advocacy, and encouragement while helping families embrace their unique journey. Whether you are preparing for birth at home, in a birth center, or in the hospital, I am committed to honoring your choices and holding space for your story while offering continuous care and heartfelt support.

# Birth Doula Support & Childbirth Education in East Texas

​Welcome to The Crunchy-ish Doula, where evidence-based education, compassionate birth support, and deep respect for the physiological design of birth come together.

Led by certified birth doula and childbirth educator Mallory Villafuerte, The Crunchy-ish Doula serves families across Tyler and the greater East Texas region, supporting them in making informed, confident decisions throughout pregnancy, birth, and postpartum.

[Schedule a Free Consultation](https://www.crunchydoula.com/book-a-call)

![11.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/e60d7a_9698fd128ef4488c9a297462cf85f5a6~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_544,h_409,al_c,lg_1,q_80,enc_avif,quality_auto/e60d7a_9698fd128ef4488c9a297462cf85f5a6~mv2.jpg)

## Empowering East Texas Families Through Education & Support

Birth is not something to be managed — it’s something to be understood, supported, and approached with confidence.

At The Crunchy-ish Doula, the focus is on restoring parents’ trust in their bodies while equipping them with clear, unbiased education so they can navigate any birth setting with clarity and peace.

Families are supported in hospital births, home births, and birth center deliveries, with care that adapts to real-world circumstances — not rigid ideals.

## Birth Doula Services in Tyler & East Texas

As your birth doula, Mallory provides continuous emotional, physical, and informational support before, during, and after birth.

Her role is not to replace medical care, but to bridge the gap between clinical systems and personal values, helping families feel heard, supported, and empowered throughout the birth process.

[View Birth Doula Services](https://www.crunchydoula.com/birth-doula-east-texas)

### What Birth Doula Support Includes

• Prenatal education and birth planning support

• Labor comfort measures and positioning

• Advocacy and communication support during labor

• Continuous presence during active labor and birth

• Emotional support for both birthing parent and partner

• Postpartum check-ins and resource guidance

​

Every family’s care is personalized because no two births are the same.

### Topics Covered in Childbirth Education

• The physiology of labor and birth

• Comfort measures and pain-coping strategies

• Medical interventions, risks, and benefits

• Induction education and decision-making

• Advocacy skills and informed consent

• Partner involvement and support roles

• Preparing for postpartum and newborn transitions

Education restores agency. Informed parents don’t control birth — but they do participate with confidence.

## Childbirth Education That Builds Confidence — Not Fear

The Empowered Birth Class is designed for parents who want more than surface-level information.

This class goes beyond coping techniques and dives into how birth works, how decisions are made, and how to stay grounded when plans change.

Whether you’re planning an unmedicated birth, a medicated hospital birth, a VBAC, or simply want to feel prepared — this education gives you tools that last well beyond delivery day.

[View Childbirth Education Classes](https://www.crunchydoula.com/childbirth-education-east-texas)

## A Balanced, Faith-Centered Approach to Birth

The Crunchy-ish Doula was founded on the belief that God designed the birthing body with intention and wisdom, while also recognizing that modern medical care can be lifesaving when needed.

Families are supported in holding both truths at once trusting the natural process of birth while remaining open handed to change, intervention, and flexibility when circumstances require it.

This is not fear based care.

This is informed, grounded, and peace centered support.

[Learn More About My Philosophy & Experience](https://www.crunchydoula.com/about-the-crunchy-ish-doula)

## Why Families Choose The Crunchy-ish Doula

• Deep knowledge paired with real-life experience

• Support without pressure or judgment

• Clear, honest education — not agendas

• Experience across hospital, home, and birth center settings

• A calm, steady presence during intense moments

• Strong advocacy rooted in respect and collaboration

Mallory is also a mother of three, bringing lived experience, empathy, and practical insight into every client relationship.

[Read Client Experiences](https://www.crunchydoula.com/about-the-crunchy-ish-doula)

![birth 1.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/e60d7a_e435e320156949bc82a68716d8f79ba8~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_98,h_65,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/e60d7a_e435e320156949bc82a68716d8f79ba8~mv2.jpg)

![baby 3.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/e60d7a_99b9d4d6f68641249715d2860294a473~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_98,h_65,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/e60d7a_99b9d4d6f68641249715d2860294a473~mv2.jpg)

## Serving Tyler, Longview & the Greater East Texas Area

The Crunchy-ish Doula proudly serves families throughout Tyler, Longview, and surrounding East Texas communities.

Whether you’re birthing locally or traveling to a nearby hospital or birth center, support is available wherever your journey leads.

![750_8729.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/e60d7a_874b0fb725d54e5ead4514033ce0b11c~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_69,h_46,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/e60d7a_874b0fb725d54e5ead4514033ce0b11c~mv2.jpg)

## Start Your Birth Journey Feeling Prepared & Supported

Birth deserves more than guesswork.

If you’re looking for birth doula support or childbirth education in East Texas, The Crunchy-ish Doula is here to walk alongside you with clarity, compassion, and confidence.

[Schedule a Free Consultation](https://www.crunchydoula.com/book-a-call)

![750_8727.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/e60d7a_163f2629b9b944dfb105365c6016d19b~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_69,h_46,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/e60d7a_163f2629b9b944dfb105365c6016d19b~mv2.jpg)

## Call to Action:

### Antiracism and Inclusivity

- MotherTree acknowledges that systemic racism is a pervasive and pernicious issue that affects individuals and communities of color disproportionately.
- We recognize that our organization has a role to play in addressing this issue and commit to creating a more inclusive and equitable environment.
- We condemn racism and discrimination in all its forms and commit to actively working against it.
- We will work to increase diversity, equity, and inclusion within our organization specifically for Black, Indigenous, Doulas of Color and LBGTQIA+ communities, and we will partner with organizations that share our commitment to anti-racism.
- We will also work to educate ourselves and others about the history and impact of racism, and we will listen to and amplify the voices of marginalized communities.

## So you want to become a Doula?

##### We’ll help you jumpstart your plans to become a doula....

But first let’s answer a couple Frequently Asked Questions.

### What's a doula?

There are so many ways to answer this question but first and foremost a doula is a compassion human who seeks to offer physical, informational and emotional support to people in the childbearing year.  [**Learn more**](https://mothertreebirth.com/become-a-doula/)

### Who can be a doula?

Anyone with a desire to support people in the perinatal period. We have supported individuals from all walks of life and all parts of the world. [**Learn more.**](https://mothertreebirth.com/become-a-doula/)

Mother Tree International has provided training around the world for birth workers seeking to expand their knowledge and join in the international community of birth professionals making a difference to reduce health disparities, increase access to care and resources.

We partner with local doula and birth hubs to establish foundational support in growing the community knowledge around birth practices. Please fill out our form if you are interested in having a training in your community.

[Learn more](https://mothertreebirth.com/global-trainings/)

## MotherTree classes

## How to choose a childbirth preparation class

Having a baby if often new territory for a family. Exploring the changes in pregnancy, what to expect in the birth process, pain coping techniques and meeting other parents are many of the reasons expectant couples choose to come to a childbirth class. Studies show that families that choose take a class of any sort tend to be more satisfied with their birth process, feel they had more control and more informed about their choices and more connected to their babies.  [**Learn more**](https://mothertreebirth.com/how-to-choose-a-childbirth-preparation-class/)

# Birth & Postpartum Support for East Texas Families

## Your Village, Right Here in East Texas

A trusted team of East Texas doulas providing calm, experienced care from pregnancy through the fourth trimester - serving Tyler, Longview, and nearby communities.

![ETX Doula Collective logo representing birth and postpartum doula services in East Texas](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/41da9d_8bba2076b51046c0ab835577926a3529~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_492,h_498,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/41da9d_8bba2076b51046c0ab835577926a3529~mv2.png)

![ETX Doula Collective supporting families with birth and postpartum doula services in East Texas](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/41da9d_d68d739c80174e8eaf4314355619f6c4~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_974,h_399,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/41da9d_d68d739c80174e8eaf4314355619f6c4~mv2.jpg)

## Meet the East Texas Doula Collective

## Our Team.

Our team is a group of trusted, highly trained doulas serving families across East Texas with compassion, professionalism, and evidence-based care. Each doula brings her own strengths - from birth support to postpartum care, breastfeeding guidance, photography, and specialty keepsakes but we are united by one purpose: to empower families with calm, confidence, and continuous support.

​

Here, you’ll meet the faces who will walk with you through pregnancy, birth, and beyond… and help you feel seen, supported, and never alone.

[![Blake Haley birth doula with Little Pines Doula supporting families in East Texas ](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/41da9d_e2e353489e504274ba0fc20b8a31089d~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_287,h_323,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/jc-photography-and-desing-6288_(2).jpg)](https://www.etxdoulas.com/blake-haley)

## Birth & Family Photography

Our doulas who specialize in birth and family photography bring a gentle, documentary-style approach to capturing your most meaningful moments. From the strength of labor to the first moments of bonding and the everyday magic of family life - they preserve your story with authenticity, emotion, and intention.

​

With a focus on connection over posing, these sessions allow you to stay fully present while we quietly document the love, details, and milestones you’ll want to remember forever. Whether it’s the raw beauty of birth or the warmth of a family gathering at home, our doulas create timeless images that honor your journey into and through parenthood.

![Pregnant mother receiving supportive birth preparation with an East Texas birth doula](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_839d1f6a60724d6fa2b8e714106d9657~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_420,h_276,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/11062b_839d1f6a60724d6fa2b8e714106d9657~mv2.jpg)

## What does a doula do during labor?

A doula provides non-medical physical, emotional, and informational support before, during, and after birth. From breathing techniques and position changes to advocacy and encouragement, your doula helps you and your partner feel calm, confident, and informed throughout labor - whether at home, in a birth center, or in the hospital.

## When should I hire a doula?

It’s best to connect with a doula by your second trimester so you have time to build trust, plan your birth preferences, and secure your support team. Postpartum and overnight care can also be booked during pregnancy or anytime after baby arrives, depending on availability.

![Newborn breastfeeding with compassionate postpartum doula support in East Texas](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_ed552dfe659142759622e31009efe31f~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_426,h_276,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Nursing%20Newborn.jpg)

## Do postpartum doulas help overnight?

Yes. Overnight doula support helps parents get the rest they desperately need. Your doula cares for baby through the night-diapering, soothing, feeding support, tracking sleep and feeds-while you sleep. If you’re breastfeeding, we gently bring baby to you and handle everything afterward so you can fall right back asleep.

![The first hour after birth is often called the Golden Hour and for good reason.  Golden Hour refers to the first uninterrupted hour after birth when baby is placed skin-to-skin with a parent whenever medically appropriate.  During this time, incredible things are happening  Babies begin adjusting to life outside the womb. Parents and babies start bonding through touch, smell, and sound. Baby's temperature, heart rate, and breathing can be supported through skin-to-skin contact. Many babies naturally begin showing feeding cues and may even self-latch.  One of the most beautiful things about Golden Hour is that it allows families time to simply be together after birth before moving on to routine procedures and visitors.  Of course, every birth is unique. Sometimes medical needs require immediate care, and that's okay too. If your Golden Hour didn't go exactly as planned, it doesn't mean you've missed your opportunity to bond with your baby. Connection can happen at any time.  As you prepare for birth, consider talking with your provider about your wishes for skin-to-skin contact and Golden Hour after delivery.  Did you experience Golden Hour with your baby?
